query:
SELECT 
  p.id, p.projectName, p.priority, p.sector, p.state, p.stageCode,
  p.estimatedValue, p.lane,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.sendReady = 1 THEN 1 END) AS srCount,
  MIN(CASE WHEN c.sendReady = 1 THEN c.name END) AS topContact,
  MIN(CASE WHEN c.sendReady = 1 THEN c.title END) AS topTitle,
  MIN(CASE WHEN c.sendReady = 1 THEN c.company END) AS topCompany,
  p.createdAt
FROM projects p
JOIN reports r ON r.projectId = p.id
JOIN contacts c ON c.reportId = r.id
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.lane NOT IN ('bess', 'pal', 'pumps')
  AND (p.state = 'WA' OR p.state IS NULL OR p.state = 'NATIONAL')
  AND c.sendReady = 1
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY 
  CASE p.priority WHEN 'hot' THEN 1 WHEN 'warm' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,
  srCount DESC,
  p.estimatedValue DESC
LIMIT 10;
